vocab.simpleEn: able to continue for a long time
vocab.exampleEn: A sustainable study routine is better than a perfect one-day plan.
vocab.exampleZh: 可持续的学习习惯比完美的一天计划更有用。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use sustainable for environment, habits, work, and study routines.
vocab.upgradeZh: sustainable 可用于环境、习惯、工作和学习节奏。

cycle.summaryEn: Learn useful word partnerships so your English sounds more natural.
cycle.summaryZh: 学习常用搭配，让英语听起来更自然。

frame.useEn: Use to show your opinion clearly.

meaningEn: This writing word helps Becky build stronger IELTS paragraphs and ideas.
meaningZh: 这个写作词可以帮助 Becky 写出更强的雅思段落和观点。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "sustainable" using In my view, ...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "sustainable" 和 在我看来，... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
